title: Repair Bear heals a creature fifteen

card.rawText: Heal a creature on the field 15 HP.

plan.title: Repair Bear heals a creature fifteen
plan.summary: Play Repair Bear targeting a damaged creature on the field and verify it heals exactly 15 HP without exceeding max HP.

notes: Place test_creature_hp100 on player_1 field as primary.
Set current HP to 80 before play.

steps: Choose player_1 primary creature as the healing target.
Resolve healing and inspect current HP.
manualVerification: Confirm the prompt can target a creature on either side of the field.
riskNotes: This fixture uses the friendly damaged creature path for deterministic HP assertions.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate standard 15 HP heal prompt path.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
